title: nepeta lophanthus
intro: Nepeta lophanthus, also known as catmint, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Nepeta lophanthus include its antimicrobial and antispasmodic properties, which can help to calm nervous symptoms and alleviate respiratory issues. Nepeta lophanthus can be prepared into teas, infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
